de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.po.snippet

Class TwoStateMethodPredicateSnippet

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.po.snippet.TwoStateMethodPredicateSnippet
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    FactoryMethod
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    BlockCallPredicateSnippet, BlockCallWithPreconditionPredicateSnippet, LoopCallPredicateSnippet, LoopCallWithInvariantPredicateSnippet, MethodCallPredicateSnippet

    abstract class TwoStateMethodPredicateSnippet
extends Object
implements FactoryMethod
    Generate term "self != null".

    Author:
    christoph

      • extractTermListForPredicate

        private ImmutableList<Term> extractTermListForPredicate(IProgramMethod pm,
                                                        ProofObligationVars poVars,
                                                        boolean hasMby)
        Parameters and the result of a method only have to appear once in the predicate. This method chooses the right variables out of the poVars.
        Parameters:
        poVars - The proof obligation variables.
        Returns:
